title: The Shore Nuisances (Bombay and Kotaba) Act, 1853
full_text: The Shore Nuisances (Bombay and Kotaba) Act, 1853 तट न्यूपसेंस (मुम्बई और कोलाबा) अधिनियम,1853 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 185311 Act Number: 11 Enactment Date: 1853-07-15 Act Year: 1853 Short Title: The Shore Nuisances (Bombay and Kotaba) Act, 1853 Hindi Title: तट न्यूपसेंस (मुम्बई और कोलाबा) अधिनियम,1853 Long Title: An Act to facilitate the removal of Nuisances and Encroachments below High-water Mark in the Islands of Bombay and Colaba Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 15-07-1853 Schedule 1.
